creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
When viewing the current porters handbook with the dark or high contrast theme, there are sections of text that are not readable.

The issue is having light text on a light background in sections such as examples.

One example is section 3.6
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/quick-porting/#porting-submitting
